entries.rationale: SHA-1 in v3/websocket.go is the RFC 6455 Sec-WebSocket-Accept handshake computation (SHA-1 of the client key + fixed GUID), which is mandated verbatim by the WebSocket standard. It is not used for security-sensitive hashing of secrets, passwords, signatures, or message integrity — it is a fixed, non-cryptographic handshake echo. No alternative is permitted by RFC 6455. Verified by REQ-SEC-007 / TestWSAcceptKey.
